overall.description: A stationary shot in a cyberpunk game engine environment showing a waterfront promenade with mixed traditional Japanese and futuristic architecture. A large digital billboard cycles through advertisements while flying vehicles pass overhead in the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk waterfront promenade with digital advertising tower

events.description: digital billboard glitches and transitions from masked figure advertisement to woman's face advertisement
flying vehicle enters from right side and moves across the sky above the canal

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the waterfront scene and digital billboard

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle moving from right to left across the sky above the water

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying cycling cyberpunk advertisements with glitch effects
traditional Japanese tiered roof structure with curved eaves in front of modern buildings
tall dark futuristic building with illuminated yellow windows and vertical neon signage
body of water separating the promenade from distant cyberpunk buildings on the opposite shore
large industrial bridge spanning across the water in the background
cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with bright neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a cyberpunk waterfront promenade featuring a striking contrast between traditional Japanese architecture and futuristic high-rises. The central digital billboard dominates the frame, cycling through glitching advertisements that transition from a masked figure to a woman's face. A flying vehicle traverses the overcast sky above the canal while the camera remains fixed on the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary view of a cyberpunk waterfront promenade where traditional Japanese architecture blends into a futuristic cityscape. It begins with a focus on the striking contrast between low-rise heritage buildings and towering high-rises under an overcast sky. As the scene unfolds, the central digital billboard dominates the frame, cycling through glitching advertisements that shift from a masked figure to a woman's face. The composition remains fixed as a flying vehicle traverses the gray expanse above the canal, completing the atmospheric tableau of a high-tech urban waterfront.
